tool.name: LangFlow
tool.description: Visual flow builder for LLM pipelines and agent workflows with self-hosting support.
tool.statusNote: DataStax Cloud is shutting down April 9, 2026. Self-hosting remains available.
tool.logoNotes: Official Langflow website logo asset (`/images/logo.png`). No separate brand-guidelines or media-kit page was found at review time, so this remains a homepage-sourced project logo pending a stronger primary source.
tool.practitionerNote: Useful for visual experimentation and internal workflow builds, though larger enterprise rollouts should validate long-term governance and platform direction after the IBM/DataStax shift.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted gives customer-controlled residency (DataStax cloud shut down 2026-04).

auditLogging.detail: No dedicated audit-logging documentation for the self-hosted OSS edition.

soc2.detail: No active managed cloud; self-hosted operators carry their own posture.

iso27001.detail: No active managed cloud to certify.

euAiAct.detail: Visual workflow-builder framework, not an AI model/provider.
